query_normalized: collectionlora: collecting 50 effects in 1 lora via multi-teacher on-policy distillation computer science
rationale: This paper shares the knowledge distillation mechanism in the LLM domain with the user's research question, satisfying criterion (a) for same-mechanism evidence. While DistillLens focuses on standard KD with Logit Lens rather than LoRA-specific multi-teacher on-policy distillation, it represents relevant prior work on distillation methods that would be expected in a literature review on LLM distillation techniques.
